name: ads-ads-baby-marketplace
description: Ads management and marketing analytics plugins by Treetank.

plugins.name: google-ads-baby
plugins.description: Google Ads campaign management with two-phase safety confirmations. Read campaigns, adjust budgets, pause/enable — every mutation requires explicit user approval.

plugins.name: meta-ads-baby
plugins.description: Meta (Facebook) Ads campaign management with two-phase safety confirmations. Create campaigns, upload creatives, manage audiences — every mutation requires explicit user approval.

plugins.name: google-analytics-baby
plugins.description: Google Analytics 4 read-only marketing analytics for ads. List properties, audit tracking, run campaign performance reports, and pull Google Ads cost/ROAS from GA4.
